description: TelematicsSDK.com is the developer-facing domain for Damoov’s mobile telematics platform. It provides smartphone-based driving and location data services for insurers, fleets, and mobility applications.
summary: telematicssdk.com exposes a documented HTTP API for telematics user management, scoring/statistics, trips, vehicles, engagement, reporting, and admin/live-tracking workflows; no public GraphQL API, MCP server, or CLI was confirmed.
